summary: Module Enable/Disable enforcement feature testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified that: (1) module toggles save correctly with success toast, (2) sidebar navigation hides links for disabled modules immediately after save, (3) direct URL access to disabled modules shows 'Module Not Available' message with Go Back button, (4) dashboard submenu items are properly filtered based on report module settings, (5) re-enabling modules restores sidebar links and route access.
passed_tests: Navigate to Tenant Settings -> Modules tab - SUCCESS
Toggle Lead Discovery module OFF and save - SUCCESS
Sidebar hides Lead Discovery after saving - SUCCESS
Direct URL /lead-discovery shows 'Module Not Available' message - SUCCESS
Toggle COGS Calculator module OFF and save - SUCCESS
Sidebar hides COGS Calculator after saving - SUCCESS
Direct URL /cogs-calculator shows 'Module Not Available' message - SUCCESS
Toggle SKU Performance report OFF and save - SUCCESS
Dashboard submenu hides SKU Performance after saving - SUCCESS
Direct URL /sku-performance shows 'Module Not Available' message - SUCCESS
Re-enable Lead Discovery module - sidebar shows it again - SUCCESS
Re-enable COGS Calculator module - sidebar shows it again - SUCCESS
Re-enable SKU Performance module - submenu shows it again - SUCCESS
Access restored to previously disabled modules - SUCCESS
TenantConfigContext refreshConfig() updates sidebar immediately - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: TenantConfigContext.js correctly implements isModuleEnabled() check with default true behavior
DashboardLayout.js properly filters sidebar navigation items using isModuleEnabled(item.moduleKey)
App.js ProtectedRoute component correctly displays 'Module Not Available' UI for disabled modules
Dashboard submenu items are filtered using both role and module configuration
refreshConfig() is called after saving modules to update sidebar immediately
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tested with existing tenant configuration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Module Enable/Disable feature is fully functional. Key implementation points: (1) TenantConfigContext stores modules state and provides isModuleEnabled() helper, (2) DashboardLayout filters sidebar items using isModuleEnabled(item.moduleKey), (3) ProtectedRoute in App.js checks moduleKey prop and displays 'Module Not Available' page if disabled, (4) refreshConfig() is called after saving to update sidebar immediately without page refresh.
